name: FeelWorld T10 10.1" IPS 4K HDMI Touchscreen Monitor
description: The T10 10.1" IPS 4K HDMI Touchscreen Monitor from FeelWorld provides an on-camera or field monitoring solution for your production needs thanks to its 1920 x 1200 native resolution, 1500:1 contrast ratio, 160° viewing angle, and integrated video assist functions.

features.Key Features:: 10.1" 1920 x 1200 Resolution Display | 500 cd/m² Brightness, 1500:1 Contrast | 4K HDMI Input and Output | 160° Viewing Angle | Up to 32 Custom 3D LUTs | F970 External Mount, NP-F Battery Plate | VESA and 1/4"-20 Mounting Points | U-Shaped Mounting Bracket
